summary: Repaired deterministic validation result for inventory-only autonomous shard. The validator identified all ten hydrated PR targets as security-sensitive, so each exact PR ref is quarantined with a non-mutating route_security action. No cluster-scoped security route, fix artifact, merge, close, label, comment, or GitHub mutation is planned.
